name: Impact.com Partnership Cloud API
what_it_does: Enterprise affiliate and partnership management API for tracking conversions, managing partner contracts, processing payouts, and reporting on program performance.
use_cases: Automating affiliate partner recruitment and contract management
Tracking conversions and attributing commissions across partner channels
Processing and reconciling partner payouts at scale
Building custom dashboards and reporting on program performance
Integrating affiliate data into broader marketing attribution workflows
not_for: Small businesses — pricing and complexity targets enterprise brands
Simple referral programs (overkill for basic refer-a-friend flows)
Developers needing a free tier to prototype
best_when: An agent manages an enterprise affiliate program and needs to automate partner onboarding, contract execution, conversion tracking, and payout processing.
avoid_when: You need a lightweight affiliate solution for a startup or don't have an existing Impact.com subscription.

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow using Account SID and Auth Token from the dashboard. All API calls must be made over HTTPS.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise SaaS subscription — pricing not publicly listed, requires sales engagement
pricing.notes: No self-serve pricing. Requires an active Impact.com account with a signed contract. API access is included with account subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by endpoint and account tier; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP error codes with JSON bodies; error messages are functional but not always actionable without consulting documentation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read operations are idempotent; write operations (e.g., creating payouts) lack explicit idempotency key support.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires an active enterprise subscription — no sandbox without a paid account
Rate limits are undocumented; agents must implement conservative backoff
OAuth token expiry requires proactive refresh logic
Payout operations are not idempotent — duplicate calls can result in double payments
Conversion data can have multi-day attribution lag; agents should not assume real-time data

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth 2.0 client credentials with Account SID/Auth Token pairs. No fine-grained API key scopes documented publicly. SOC2 and GDPR compliance certified.
